	/* nova_ext_ordered_mission_posts:feed v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	public function posts()
	{
		if (class_exists('nova_ext_ordered_mission_posts\\Feed')) {
			$data = \nova_ext_ordered_mission_posts\Feed::buildPosts();
			header('Content-Type: application/rss+xml');
			$this->_regions['items'] = Location::view('_base/rss_items', null, null, $data);
			Template::assign($this->_regions);
			Template::render();
			return;
		}

		parent::posts();
	}
	/* nova_ext_ordered_mission_posts:feed END */
